title:Test wishlist
description:Hand-written fixture exercising the informal DIM wishlist format.

// A comment about the next roll
//notes:Roll notes with metadata|tags:PvE PvE-God
dimwishlist:item=111&perks=1,2,3
dimwishlist:item=111&perks=1,2,4
dimwishlist:item=222&perks=5,6#notes:inline note suffix
dimwishlist:item=-333
dimwishlist:item=-444&perks=7,8
dimwishlist:item=-69420&perks=9
dimwishlist:item=oops&perks=1
@description:stray metadata line seen in real lists
Recommended MW: prose that lost its comment marker, also seen in the wild.
